mapper.sql: select review_id, order_id, order_no, product_id, reviewer_id, reviewer_type, reviewed_id, reviewed_type, rating, content, review_images, create_time, update_time from product_order_review
mapper.select: where order_id = #{orderId} and reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} and reviewer_type = #{reviewerType} limit 1
where order_id = #{orderId} order by create_time desc

select r.review_id, r.order_id, r.order_no, r.product_id, o.product_title, o.product_image, r.reviewer_id, r.reviewer_type, reviewer.nick_name as reviewer_name, reviewer.avatar as reviewer_avatar, r.reviewed_id, r.reviewed_type, reviewed.nick_name as reviewed_name, reviewed.avatar as reviewed_avatar, r.rating, r.content, r.review_images, r.create_time, r.update_time from product_order_review r left join product_order o on r.order_id = o.order_id left join client reviewer on r.reviewer_id = reviewer.user_id left join client reviewed on r.reviewed_id = reviewed.user_id where r.product_id = #{productId} order by r.create_time desc

select r.review_id, r.order_id, r.order_no, r.product_id, o.product_title, o.product_image, r.reviewer_id, r.reviewer_type, reviewer.nick_name as reviewer_name, reviewer.avatar as reviewer_avatar, r.reviewed_id, r.reviewed_type, reviewed.nick_name as reviewed_name, reviewed.avatar as reviewed_avatar, r.rating, r.content, r.review_images, r.create_time, r.update_time from product_order_review r left join product_order o on r.order_id = o.order_id left join client reviewer on r.reviewer_id = reviewer.user_id left join client reviewed on r.reviewed_id = reviewed.user_id where r.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} order by r.create_time desc

select r.review_id, r.order_id, r.order_no, r.product_id, o.product_title, o.product_image, r.reviewer_id, r.reviewer_type, reviewer.nick_name as reviewer_name, reviewer.avatar as reviewer_avatar, r.reviewed_id, r.reviewed_type, reviewed.nick_name as reviewed_name, reviewed.avatar as reviewed_avatar, r.rating, r.content, r.review_images, r.create_time, r.update_time from product_order_review r left join product_order o on r.order_id = o.order_id left join client reviewer on r.reviewer_id = reviewer.user_id left join client reviewed on r.reviewed_id = reviewed.user_id where r.reviewed_id = #{reviewedId} order by r.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into product_order_review
order_id, order_no, product_id, reviewer_id, reviewer_type, reviewed_id, reviewed_type, rating, content, review_images, create_time, update_time,
#{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewerType}, #{reviewedId}, #{reviewedType}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{reviewImages}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from product_order_review where review_id in
#{reviewId}
